title: Film Making
description: Collection of mods that can be used for making content like YouTube videos
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/604eae81277201ed1905fea8bb6b5cd73cca9beb_0.webp)

**This Modpack aims to help content creators with their cinematic shots, timelapses and includes everything you would need to make a good video.**

---

### Mods included:
- Camera Utils
- Creator Overlays
- Motion Capture
- OrthoCamera
- ReplayMod
- Unbound Fov
and many more!

You can use most of the features in Multiplayer, but stuff like the Motion Capture mod works best in Singeplayer.
